title: Agent and Git Stuck in Unusable State

problemSummary.description: The Replit "Receiver" application got stuck in an unusable state — git rebase stuck, agent errors, .git/index.lock blocking everything, and Replit's security restrictions preventing manual recovery.
symptoms: Agent returns "Agent encountered an error while running, we are investigating the issue"
Git pane permanently stuck on "Unsupported state: you are in the middle of a rebase. Please finish the rebase manually."
.git/index.lock file exists, blocking all git operations (git rebase --abort, git reset --hard HEAD, git reset --hard origin/main)
Preview pane shows "The App is currently not running"
User cannot remove index.lock due to Replit security restrictions
problemSummary.rootCause: A git conflict between local pushes and Replit agent changes caused a rebase to get stuck. A crashed or hanging git process left behind .git/index.lock, and Replit's security restrictions prevented the user from deleting it manually, locking out all git operations and the agent.

timeline.subject: Replit Support Ticket #83298
timeline.content:
Hello from Replit,

Thank you for reaching out to our support team. We have received your request and a support ticket has been created for you. Our team is currently reviewing your issue and will get back to you as soon as possible.

Best,
Replit Support

timeline.subject: Re: [Technical] I am unable to use my code base or agent
timeline.content:
Hello Mannan,

Thank you for contacting Replit Support.

Let's try these steps to resolve the Agent issues:

1. First, run kill 1 in the shell to reset the container, then refresh the page and start a new agent chat thread.

2. If that doesn't work, try these alternatives:
   - Use Git to rollback to a working version (via the Git pane)
   - Start a new chat with the Agent
   - Wait a few hours and try again

Could you please provide a screenshot of the exact error message you're seeing? This will help me better understand the issue and provide more specific guidance.

Please let me know if you've tried these steps and if you're still experiencing issues.

Regards,
Alex

Hi Alex this did not resolve my problem.

The agent is stuck.

I tried to restart the container with the command you prompted in terminal/shell, looked like it did something (no verification was shown that it restarted the container). Whenever I try to use the agent whether I start a new chat or not, it returns: "Agent encountered an error while running, we are investigating the issue."

Sometimes it looks like its doing something in a new chat, but it does and just returns the above error.

My git pane has been stuck and unusable.

It only displays "Unsupported state: you are in the middle of a rebase. Please finish the rebase manually."

Whether I close it, exit the project, open a new git, open the project again. The project is stuck and unusable. I can't use the agent to write the code — the core promise of the replit platform. I started using replit to make it easier to write the code, started this project, got further along, also used local code IDE to develop code in vscode and push the code to github. Sometimes I would write code in replit sometimes locally, deploy and view the changes in replit (it acting as my infrastructure as service and platform).

After some git conflict I think replit broke — the agent got stuck, the git pane got stuck. It is unusable no matter what I try. It looks like some process somewhere is stuck, can you look into it? The project is my "Receiver" application. Even preview is not working any longer. Please share suggestions.

Preview your App here: The App is currently not running.

What a shame, this really destroyed my productivity with this project.

Hello Mannan,

I understand you're experiencing a complex issue with both Git and the Agent in your "Receiver" application. Let's try these specific steps to resolve the Git rebase issue first, as this might be blocking other functionality:

1. Open the shell in your Repl and try these Git commands:
   git rebase --abort

   If that doesn't work, try:
   git reset --hard HEAD

2. If the above commands don't work, you can try forcing a reset to your last known good state:
   git fetch origin
   git reset --hard origin/main
   (Replace 'main' with your branch name if different)

Could you please:
1. Try these commands and let me know the outcome
2. Share a join link to your "Receiver" Repl
3. Provide a screenshot of any error messages you see after trying these commands

This will help me better understand the state of your Repl and provide more specific assistance or escalate to a teammate if needed.

Regards,
Alex

Note another important detail, it looks like your systems git process is stuck and due to replit security system around git lock file it is blocking me from manually resolving the issue around the git rebase. When I run the commands in shell it locks me out, here is some of the results:
timeline.terminalOutput:

timeline.content: I just saw a follow on message with details acknowledging the git issues and with some steps to try, trying them now.

I understand this Git lock situation is blocking your work, and I apologize for the inconvenience. Since this requires deeper system access to resolve the Git lock issues, I'm connecting you with a teammate who has the necessary permissions to help.

Please note that we're experiencing high demand, so it may take some time for them to respond. In the meantime, I recommend making sure you have a backup of your latest code changes locally.

Hi Alex thanks for the steps to debug with git and try to restore the repo. Unfortunately there's a git process running somewhere that has blocked me from running those commands, the result is below:

Maybe it's the agent thread? I think I was using it for help with git and resolving merge conflicts.

Is this the join link you were asking for? https://replit.com/join/xpxxmjoglu-hello2642

I hope maybe someone has ability to go into the container running the agent and rebooting the agent's process.

timeline.content: Thanks. I sent more details about the git results in another thread, thanks for escalating. I do have copies of the work latest in git. Just wanting the replit environment to be completely reset to the latest state of the repo (it is out of sync — and I think the agent is stuck too — maybe a full reboot would be in order).

Hello,

Thank you for reaching out to Replit Support. I hope you're doing well.

We sincerely apologize for the delay in our response. Due to a higher-than-usual volume of inquiries, our response time has been longer than usual, and we truly appreciate your understanding and patience.

I'm following up on your previous inquiry to check if the issue is still ongoing. Could you please provide an update on the current situation so we can assist you in resolving it?

Kind regards,
Shivam
Replit Support Engineer

timeline.subject: Support ticket 83298 solved
timeline.content:
Hello!

Your support ticket 83298 — [Technical] I am unable to use my code base or agent has gone without an update for 5 days and been marked solved by our system.

If you still need help feel free to reply back within 4 days and the ticket will reopen in our queue automatically. Otherwise, feel free to open up a new support ticket.

Thanks!
The Replit Team

screenshots.caption: Agent error message: "Agent encountered an error while running, we are investigating the issue"
Git pane stuck on rebase message
Preview pane: "The App is currently not running"

currentStatus.details: The ticket was opened on May 22, 2025. Alex (Support) attempted basic troubleshooting and then escalated the issue on May 23 to a teammate with "necessary permissions." After 25 days of silence, Shivam (Support) sent a generic follow-up on June 18. Two days later on June 20, the system auto-closed the ticket as "solved" without any resolution being provided. No one with the "necessary permissions" ever responded.
